title: ‘I Just Want to Be Back’: Thousands Rush South in Lebanon Under Cease-Fire
summary_full: Lebanese people who had been displaced by fighting expressed a mix of excitement and uncertainty about a pause in Israel’s campaign against Hezbollah.
